name_en: TAG TEAM GX Tag All Stars
name_jp: TAG TEAM GX タッグオールスターズ

box_guarantees._source: pokemoncard.co.kr Korean official card list + FullAhead Japanese secret-card supplement + Bulbapedia SM12a product notes. Japanese product model guarantees at least one SR-or-higher card per box; community model: RR 9-10, basic-energy SR 1, main high slot SR 70% / HR 20% / UR 10%, and SR10 god pack about 1 per 250 packs (box-level about 3.9%). Korean official pull rates are unpublished.
